chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 156 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7494/2023 (C/A) 05.03.2024 Mr. Samiullah Khan Rind, Advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents through his statement has submitted an original cheque of Rs.19,96,957/- in favour of the petitioner, who is present in person and has received the same. Learned Counsel for the University submits that remaining amount of Rs.10,00,000/- has already been deposited in petitioner’s bank account on 20.02.2024; hence, entire amount has been paid to him. In view of above, this application, having served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
